name: Frank Vignola
abstract: Frank Vignola (born December 30, 1965) is an American jazz guitarist. He has played in the genres of swing, fusion, gypsy jazz, classical, and pop.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Ascione
about_quotes.evidence: Frank Vignola, great guitarist, I work a lot with him, we’re great friends and do a lot of musical business work together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Ascione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Flanigan
about_quotes.evidence: I went over with Frank Vignola, the guitarist, he did a little Django group there a little over a year ago
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Flanigan interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 15, 1998
